ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_alacri: Grants increased overall speed to the target. Beware the lethargic backlash once the spell ends.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_bless: Grants increasing healing to the target for the duration.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_empowe: Grants increased physical strength for melee attacks and jumping power to the target.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_false_: Grants faux vitality to the target for a short duration.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_invigo: Passively recovers target's hunger and saturation.
ars_astrologique.glyph_desc.glyph_stalwa: Turns the target into an immovable guardian. Grants increased damage and knockback reduction at the cost of slower movement speed.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_alacrity_: Increases overall speed at the cost of a harsher backlash when the spell ends.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_bless_gly: Amplifies incoming healing to the target.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_empower_g: Increases melee damage, knockback, and jumping strength.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_false_lif: Increases the amount of temporary health granted.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_invigorat: Amplifies the target's passive hunger and saturation recovery.
ars_nouveau.augment_desc.glyph_stalwart_: Increases damage and knockback resistance at the cost of even slower movement.
